== Notes for [[Item:Q112273|Q112273]] ==

Tutadona Moniz, Tuta ou Toda (960-1025), filha de Munio Forjaz (930-?) e de Elvira Pais Daza (c.930-?).

----------

Mendo Gonçalves, was born in 946 and died in 1008. Married with Tutadona Moniz in 960 who had the following children: Rodrigo Mendes and Elvira Mendes, the Portuguese sovereign countess and wife of Alfonso V, King of Leon
--------------------
http://www.our-royal-titled-noble-and-commoner-ancestors.com/p268.htm#i8053

Countess of Portugal

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
